description: Personal-tutor subagents (language-tutor, skill-coach) — Socratic language teaching (EN/CN), time-mgmt/health/data-analysis coaching.

cases.prompt: Teach the difference between 'present perfect' and 'past simple' using a Socratic question, not a lecture. The learner is Thai.
Explain the 4 Mandarin tones with a minimal pair example. Give a practice drill.
A learner wrote: 'I have go to school yesterday.' Correct it and explain the rule gently.
Teach the Eisenhower matrix using the learner's own example tasks. Ask them to categorize one.
A learner sleeps 5 hours and relies on caffeine. Coach them to 7 hours over 4 weeks — propose graduated steps.
Teach what 'mean vs median' means using a salary example where one CEO skews the mean. Ask a check question.
Teach the word 'ubiquitous' by embedding it in 3 contexts the learner would recognize, then ask them to use it.
A learner procrastinates. Introduce the Pomodoro technique and have them plan their first session.
A Thai learner confused 'library' with 'bookstore' (ร้านหนังสือ). Clarify the difference in English.
Teach a beginner how to use a VLOOKUP in a spreadsheet, with one worked example and one practice task.
